message:
feat(notion): add FCP2 manifest definitions for database and block CRUD operations

Add full manifest entries for 6 new Notion operations: get_database,
create_database, update_database, get_block, update_block, delete_block.
Each includes input/output schemas, rate limits, network constraints
(api.notion.com only), safety tiers, and AI hints.

Update introspect test assertions from 10 to 16 operations to cover
all new entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -209,6 +209,145 @@ related = ["notion.get_page"]
 
 # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database"]
+description = "Retrieve a Notion database by ID"
+capability = "notion.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".input_schema]
+required = ["database_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".input_schema.properties.database_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".output_schema]
+required = ["database"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".output_schema.properties.database]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_database".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve a database schema and properties."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"database_id": "abc123-def456"}']
+related = ["notion.query_database", "notion.update_database"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database"]
+description = "Create a new database in a page"
+capability = "notion.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".input_schema]
+required = ["parent", "title", "properties"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".input_schema.properties.parent]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".input_schema.properties.title]
+type = "array"
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".input_schema.properties.properties]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".output_schema]
+required = ["database"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".output_schema.properties.database]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.create_database".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new inline database within a page."
+common_mistakes = ["Not specifying at least one property definition"]
+examples = ['{"parent": {"page_id": "abc123"}, "title": [{"text": {"content": "Tasks"}}], "properties": {"Name": {"title": {}}}}']
+related = ["notion.get_database", "notion.query_database"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database"]
+description = "Update a database's title, description, or properties"
+capability = "notion.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".input_schema]
+required = ["database_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".input_schema.properties.database_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".input_schema.properties.title]
+type = "array"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".input_schema.properties.properties]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".input_schema.properties.description]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".output_schema]
+required = ["database"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".output_schema.properties.database]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_database".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Update a database schema, title, or description."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"database_id": "abc123", "title": [{"text": {"content": "Updated Tasks"}}]}']
+related = ["notion.get_database"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
 [provides.operations."notion.query_database"]
 description = "Query a Notion database with filters and sorts"
 capability = "notion.read"
@@ -303,6 +442,137 @@ related = ["notion.query_database", "notion.get_page"]
 
 # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block"]
+description = "Retrieve a single block by ID"
+capability = "notion.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".input_schema]
+required = ["block_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".input_schema.properties.block_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".output_schema]
+required = ["block"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".output_schema.properties.block]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.get_block".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve a specific block by its ID."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"block_id": "abc123"}']
+related = ["notion.get_block_children", "notion.update_block"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block"]
+description = "Update a block's content"
+capability = "notion.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".input_schema]
+required = ["block_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".input_schema.properties.block_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".input_schema.properties.paragraph]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".output_schema]
+required = ["block"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".output_schema.properties.block]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.update_block".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Update the content of a block."
+common_mistakes = ["Sending the wrong block type key for the block"]
+examples = ['{"block_id": "abc123", "paragraph": {"rich_text": [{"text": {"content": "Updated text"}}]}}']
+related = ["notion.get_block", "notion.delete_block"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block"]
+description = "Archive (soft-delete) a block"
+capability = "notion.delete"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".input_schema]
+required = ["block_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".input_schema.properties.block_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".output_schema]
+required = ["block"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".output_schema.properties.block]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.notion.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."notion.delete_block".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Archive a block (soft delete)."
+common_mistakes = ["Expecting permanent deletion — Notion only archives"]
+examples = ['{"block_id": "abc123"}']
+related = ["notion.get_block"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
 [provides.operations."notion.get_block_children"]
 description = "Get child blocks of a block or page"
 capability = "notion.read"
@@ -528,8 +798,14 @@ scope = "instance"
 "notion.get_page" = ["notion.read"]
 "notion.update_page" = ["notion.write"]
 "notion.delete_page" = ["notion.delete"]
+"notion.get_database" = ["notion.read"]
+"notion.create_database" = ["notion.write"]
+"notion.update_database" = ["notion.write"]
 "notion.query_database" = ["notion.read"]
 "notion.search" = ["notion.read"]
+"notion.get_block" = ["notion.read"]
+"notion.update_block" = ["notion.write"]
+"notion.delete_block" = ["notion.delete"]
 "notion.get_block_children" = ["notion.read"]
 "notion.append_blocks" = ["notion.write"]
 "notion.add_comment" = ["notion.write"]
